_comment: scout-bugs coverage map — least-recently-audited cluster gets picked each run. The scout updates last_audited + last_findings after each run. Clusters are USER-PATH shaped, not file-shaped.

flows: approval arrives as push while app backgrounded
push-relay.note: ABH-269/270 found here; relay on-device path still open (ABH-215)

flows: approve in-app vs REST vs WS parity

chat-steer-sessions.note: Re-audited 2026-07-03 (manual; swarm CLI produced empty output again -- see push-relay note, same failure mode). All 5 flows walked through source, both iPhone (CompactLayout) and iPad (SplitLayout/NavigationSplitView) code paths. 2 NEW type:fix filed: ABH-320 (P3, biggest find: ComposerView.text is plain view-local @State with no persistence; ChatView's transcript+composer subtree carries .id(chatStore.activeStoredSessionId) which remounts on every session switch AND RootView swaps SplitLayout<->CompactLayout structs on iPad size-class change mid-draft -- both paths silently wipe unsent composer text, no warning, no queue entry; pending attachments survive since AttachmentStore is a separate injected store, only free text is lost -- filed with the iPad rotation trigger as a comment, same root cause), ABH-321 (P4, minor: isQueueMode conflates streaming and offline+queueable-text, so the composer's 'Steer now' menu option is offered and attempted while offline, where it always fails with 'No active session' -- text is preserved, Queue for after still works, but the option is a dead/confusing menu entry with a spurious haptic). Flows verified CLEAN: queue prompt/drain (FIFO, re-entrancy, session-affinity all correct), session list/resume/rename incl. iPad split-view sidebar+detail sync (both panes read the same @Observable SessionStore, no desync), interrupt-then-continue (interruptTarget correctly routes to mirroringRuntimeId, retry/edit gate on localTurnInFlight correctly), long-turn progress display incl. iPad rotation/backgrounding (isStreaming/activeToolName/turnStartedAt all live on the ChatStore singleton, not view-local state, so they survive the same remounts that break composer text -- TurnActivityBar unaffected).

providers-credentials.note: SATURATED today - do not re-audit before 2026-07-05

flows: share sheet -> queued item -> visible outcome
share-widgets-capture.note: First dedicated pass (swarm fan-out, 3 flows: share-sheet, widget deep links, quick-capture). ABH-267 (stall/no-toast) and ABH-271 (dead capture route) verified still current, not re-filed. 3 NEW type:fix filed: ABH-310 (share-drain discards content on failed send but reports success via unchecked chat.send Bool return), ABH-311 (non-atomic batch drain -> duplicate session/send if app killed mid-drain), ABH-312 (widget/Live Activity tap during an active turn calls startDraft()->chat.reset()->cancelStreaming()->onTurnDiscarded->LiveActivityManager.end(), destroying the local view of the very turn the user tapped to check on -- root cause: HermesTurnAttributes carries no session id to route on). 4 polish bullets appended to ABH-290 digest (dead RecordingControls.compact param, stale VoiceRecorder/DrawerView quick-capture doc comments, unbounded share-inbox queue size, generic non-specific 'review' approval landing). Quick-capture confirmed fully dead everywhere (Intents/Shortcuts/Siri/widgets/Control Center/URL routing/share ext) beyond ABH-271's known dead capture() factory.

reconnect-offline.note: audited 2026-07-02 (manual, swarm CLI produced empty output that run): 4 flows traced; 3 CLEAN (flap mid-turn, suspend/resume, gateway restart backoff); 1 finding filed as ABH-295 (SessionStore.lastError unobserved -> silent resume failures). Filed 2026-07-03 by supervisor sweep.
